prompts.title: WhatsApp Bridal Enquiry Reply Template
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior bridal mehndi & makeup studio manager handling 40+ enquiries a week on WhatsApp Business. Draft a 4-message reply flow for a fresh bridal enquiry that arrived as 'Hi, do you do bridal mehndi for 14 Feb wedding in Jaipur?' Message 1 (greeting + thanks + studio intro in 60 words, signature line with Insta handle and 5-star Google rating). Message 2 (clarifying questions: ceremony list — engagement / haldi / sangeet / mehndi night / wedding day / reception, head-count for family mehndi, venue pin code, mehndi style preference — Rajasthani, Indo-Arabic, Marwari portrait, minimalist, Bengali alta-style; ask for save-the-date image if any). Message 3 (price ladder in INR — bridal full hand+feet ₹15k–₹35k depending on detailing & artist tier, family member ₹500–₹2,500 per pair of hands, Karwa-Chauth-style full hand ₹2,000, men's mehndi ₹300; mention festive-week surge of 25% between Oct–Feb). Message 4 (advance ₹5,000 to block date, balance on completion via UPI, 72-hour postponement window without penalty, organic Rajasthani henna paste, no-PPD chemical dye disclaimer, allergy patch test 7 days prior). Use warm Hinglish, two emojis maximum per message, no all-caps, end with a Calendly-style booking link placeholder. Output as four numbered WhatsApp blocks ready to copy-paste.

prompts.title: Design-Style Consultation Form (Google Form Copy)
prompts.prompt: You are a UX-savvy bridal mehndi artist building a Google Form to qualify bride enquiries before a paid trial. Write the entire form copy: form title, friendly 80-word intro paragraph, and 18 questions covering — full name, WhatsApp number, wedding date, mehndi night date, city + venue, religion / community (Marwari, Punjabi, Gujarati, Bengali, South-Indian, Muslim, Christian, NRI), preferred style (Rajasthani full-figurine, Indo-Arabic floral, Moroccan geometric, minimalist trail, portrait of bride-groom), depth of coverage (full hand to elbow / full hand to upper arm / full leg to knee / feet only), groom name to be hidden in design (yes/no + spelling), allergies / sensitive skin / pregnancy / diabetes / thyroid medication, henna last applied date, skin tone (Fitzpatrick I–VI dropdown with Indian descriptors fair/wheatish/dusky/deep), how many family members need mehndi, expected start time at venue, preferred artist count (solo / 2-artist team / 4-artist team for 50+ guests), reference image upload, budget bracket (₹10k–₹15k / ₹15k–₹25k / ₹25k–₹40k / ₹40k+), how she heard about us (Instagram / JustDial / UrbanCompany / WedMeGood / referral). Include polite closing and 48-hour reply SLA promise. Mark which 6 fields are required.

prompts.title: Advance Payment Script (Voice + WhatsApp)
prompts.prompt: Act as a bridal mehndi artist closing a ₹28,000 booking for a 12 Nov Marwari wedding in Udaipur. Write two scripts: (a) a 90-second phone-call closing pitch in conversational Hinglish that explains why a ₹7,000 non-refundable advance is required (date-blocking, raw-material procurement of fresh organic Sojat henna, blocking 2 assistants, declining other parties), assures the bride about safety and trust, and walks her through paying via UPI / GPay / PhonePe with the studio's verified handle; (b) a polite WhatsApp follow-up sent 30 minutes after the call with the bank details, GST-included invoice number format, payment screenshot request, and a one-line postponement-policy summary (date can be shifted once within 90 days at no cost, full forfeit only on no-show or <72-hour cancellation). Add a soft objection-handling block for three common pushbacks: 'too much advance', 'pay 50% now 50% later', and 'my cousin's friend charges only ₹15k for the same'. Keep the tone warm, never desperate, never pushy. End with a confirmation checklist of 5 items the bride should send back.

prompts.title: Postponement & Cancellation Policy Document
prompts.prompt: You are the operations head of a 12-artist bridal studio in Mumbai. Draft a one-page client-facing postponement & cancellation policy in plain Hinglish-English (Class-10 reading level). Cover: (1) what counts as advance vs balance, (2) free date-shift window (within 90 days of original date, subject to availability, one-time only), (3) chargeable date-shift (₹2,500 admin fee if >90 days), (4) cancellation slabs — 30+ days before event 100% advance refund minus ₹1,000 processing, 15–30 days 50% refund, 7–15 days 25% refund, <7 days zero refund, (5) force-majeure clause for COVID / floods / family bereavement (death certificate or hospital paper required, then full credit note valid 12 months), (6) artist-substitution clause (studio reserves right to send equally-skilled artist of same tier if lead artist falls ill, with 48-hour notice), (7) overtime billing past contracted hours (₹1,500 per artist per hour after 11 pm), (8) travel and stay clauses for destination weddings, (9) photography rights (studio may use mehndi photos for portfolio unless bride opts out in writing). End with signature blocks for bride, family contact, and studio rep. Output as a numbered policy ready to PDF.

prompts.title: Festive Week Rate Card (Karwa Chauth + Diwali + Eid)
prompts.prompt: Act as a Delhi NCR mehndi artist building a printable & WhatsApp-shareable festive-week rate card valid 15 Oct–15 Nov. Output a clean tabular rate card covering — Karwa Chauth (front + back full hand ₹2,000, only front ₹1,200, bridal-detail upgrade +₹800, gold glitter +₹300, swarovski stones +₹500), Diwali / Bhai Dooj (front hand ₹1,000, both hands ₹1,800, kids under-12 ₹400), Eid (full hand + half feet Indo-Arabic ₹2,500, finger-tip-only Khaleeji style ₹600), home-visit charges (within 5km free with 2+ heads, 5–15km ₹500, 15–30km ₹1,200, beyond ₹25/km), assembly-line slot booking (15 women in 4 hours at host home ₹18,000 inclusive), corporate office Diwali on-site (₹6,000 per artist per 3-hour slot, minimum 2 artists), surge note (last 48 hours of Karwa Chauth +30%, walk-in slots not guaranteed). Add a footer with sterilised single-use cone promise, organic henna sourced from Sojat Rajasthan, no-PPD black-henna warning, and a UPI-only-no-cash payment line. Layout for a 1080x1350 Insta carousel + a JustDial-friendly text version.

prompts.title: Bridal Full Trousseau Package Pitch Deck
prompts.prompt: You are pitching a ₹1.85 lakh full-trousseau bridal package to a Punjabi bride in Ludhiana with a 6-day wedding (roka-redo, mehndi night, sangeet, haldi, wedding, reception). Write a 9-slide WhatsApp PDF pitch: (Slide 1) Cover with bride's name, wedding hashtag, studio logo. (Slide 2) Why-us — 11 years, 800+ brides, certified MAC + Lakmé Pro, hygiene SOP. (Slide 3) Pre-bridal 30-day skin & hair plan (5 sittings, ₹22,000). (Slide 4) Mehndi night — bridal Indo-Arabic full hand to upper arm + full leg to knee + 8 family members ₹38,000. (Slide 5) Sangeet — HD makeup + retro-curl half-up half-down + jewelled hair piece ₹18,000. (Slide 6) Haldi morning 6 am look — dewy minimal + braided gajra + yellow floral jewellery styling ₹12,000. (Slide 7) Wedding day — airbrush Mughal-bride look + heavy juda with kaleere + dupatta draping + kalira tying + 4-hour on-site retouch ₹52,000. (Slide 8) Reception — modern smokey + sleek low pony + hair extensions ₹16,000. (Slide 9) Bundle saving ₹27,000, advance ₹40,000, EMI option via Cred. Add tone notes — celebratory, never salesy, two testimonial quotes per relevant slide. Indian rupee symbols throughout.

prompts.title: Group Booking Discount Calculator Logic
prompts.prompt: Act as a studio operations analyst building the discount-math logic that the front-desk uses on WhatsApp when families ask 'we are 18 ladies for mehndi, what is the price?' Write the rule engine in plain English + a worked example. Rules: base per-pair-of-hands rate ₹1,200 (simple) / ₹1,800 (medium) / ₹2,500 (heavy bridal-style for non-bride). Bride is always quoted separately. Slabs — 1–4 ladies no discount, 5–9 ladies 8% off, 10–14 ladies 12% off, 15–19 ladies 15% off + 1 free kid mehndi, 20–29 ladies 18% off + 2 free kids + complimentary glitter, 30+ ladies 22% off + dedicated artist team + free 1 muh-dikhai touch-up. Festive surcharge (Karwa Chauth week) overrides discount cap at 10%. Travel — free up to 8 km, ₹400 flat 8–20 km, ₹15/km beyond. Overtime past 4 hours ₹400 per artist per hour. Worked example: 18 medium-design ladies + bride heavy at ₹22,000 + travel 14 km + 5-hour booking on 18 Oct (Karwa week). Show step-by-step calculation, final invoice line items, GST 18% if invoice requested, advance 30%. End with a copy-ready WhatsApp quote message.

prompts.title: Travel & Outstation Charges Policy
prompts.prompt: You are a Bengaluru-based bridal artist increasingly booked for destination weddings in Goa, Udaipur, Jaipur, Coorg, and Kerala backwaters. Draft a transparent travel-charges policy covering — (1) intra-city Bengaluru (free up to 10 km from HSR Layout studio, ₹500 flat 10–25 km, ₹20/km beyond, parking + toll actuals), (2) intra-Karnataka day trip (₹4,500 flat for cab + breakfast + return same day under 250 km), (3) overnight outstation within India (return AC train 3A or economy flight, AC twin-sharing 3-star+ stay, all meals, ₹3,500 per artist per day daily allowance, kit-handling forfeit ₹2,000 if airline damages product), (4) destination-wedding 3-day package (₹85,000 for lead artist + 1 assistant inclusive of all travel/stay/per-diem/local transport/2 ceremonies covered, additional ceremony ₹18,000), (5) international (UAE, Singapore, Bali, London) — separate quote, visa-handling by client, full per-diem 100 USD, business-class for flights >6 hours, kit-clearance letter from studio. Mention insurance for kit valued ₹3.5 lakh, hygiene-pack carry rules, customs-friendly herbal-henna declaration. End with three FAQs and a quote-request form link.

prompts.title: Engagement Mehndi Mini Service Menu
prompts.prompt: Act as a boutique mehndi artist designing a service menu specifically for the engagement ceremony (smaller, photo-heavy, modern brides). Output a 1-pager covering 6 product tiers — (1) 'Ring-finger trail' minimalist tip-to-wrist ₹1,500 (30 min, perfect for ring-shot photography), (2) 'Half hand modern Arabic' ₹2,800 (1 hour, contemporary leafy + dotwork), (3) 'Full hand floral with groom initial hidden' ₹4,500 (90 min, 1 initial), (4) 'Full hand + forearm mandala fusion' ₹6,500 (2 hours), (5) 'Couple set' bride full hand + groom Sufi-style cuff ₹7,500, (6) 'Engagement signature' bride both hands + feet light + 4 family members ₹14,000. For each tier list — design style, time taken, drying time required before guests arrive, retention life (10/14/21 days), photo-readiness time, recommended outfit colour palette to make stain pop (mustard, maroon, deep green, ivory, teal — avoid black/grey). Add upgrade add-ons — gold leaf ₹400, swarovski ₹500, white-henna body art ₹1,800. Close with a booking note — book 21 days in advance for engagement season Nov–Feb.

prompts.title: Sangeet & Jagran Night Mehndi Workflow
prompts.prompt: You are running a 4-artist team at a Marwari sangeet-cum-jagran night with 60 women guests, mehndi service from 6 pm to midnight, venue is a banquet hall in Jodhpur. Build the entire workflow document — (1) pre-event recce checklist (lighting white-light vs warm, AC vents not blowing on guests' wet henna, dedicated 4 chair + 4 stool seating zone, 2 power sockets for fans/lamps, dustbin for cone tips), (2) artist tier allocation (Lead does bride only — 3 hours full Marwari portrait both hands + feet; Senior 1 does 12 close-family ladies medium designs; Senior 2 does 18 cousin/aunty light designs; Junior does 25 quick-turn tips/finger trails for kids and friends), (3) per-head time targets (light 8 min, medium 18 min, heavy 35 min, bridal 180 min), (4) cone-stock plan (carry 80 organic cones + 20 white henna cones + 10 glitter tubes + 8 swarovski sheets + sealed eucalyptus oil), (5) hygiene station (sanitiser, fresh tissues, single-use gloves), (6) queue-management script for over-eager aunties, (7) time-overrun escalation (if running 90+ min late, add ₹1,500/artist/hour to invoice with prior intimation to host).

prompts.title: Baby-Shower Mehndi (Godh Bharai) Service Card
prompts.prompt: Act as a mehndi artist marketing a delicate godh-bharai / baby-shower mehndi service to expecting moms in their 7th month. Write a service card covering — safety-first messaging (100% organic Sojat henna, strict no-PPD, no chemical adulterants, patch test 48 hours prior, designs limited to hands and feet only, no upper-arm / leg-above-knee, no eucalyptus oil if asthmatic, low-fume ventilation, 30-min comfort breaks every hour), 4 design themes (Mommy-and-baby footprint motifs ₹2,500 single hand, Floral elephant + cradle ₹3,500 both hands, Pregnant-Goddess fertility motif ₹4,500 both hands, Full-bridal-style for the 'maternity shoot' ₹7,500 hands+feet light), photo-package upsell (₹2,000 add-on for a 30-min reel + 10 edited photos shot by partner photographer), home-visit only policy (no studio visit in 3rd trimester for safety), seating arrangement (back-supportive chair, foot-rest, glucose drink, fresh-cut fruits), partner husband co-design option ('His name hidden inside the elephant' ₹600 add). End with a tender 60-word brand-promise paragraph and 3 testimonial quotes from past mom clients.

prompts.title: Festival Mini Pack — Diwali On-Site Corporate
prompts.prompt: You are pitching corporate HR teams in Gurgaon Cyber City for a Diwali on-site mehndi activation. Draft a one-page proposal email + cost sheet for a 4-hour activation covering 60 women employees. Include — concept ('Bandhan Diwali Mehndi Lounge' — 2 mehndi artists + 1 nail-art artist + 1 photo-corner host with diya prop), inclusions (60 single-hand simple-Indo-Arabic mehndi designs, 60 quick nail-art accents, branded backdrop with company logo, 4 polaroids per employee, single-use hygiene cones, on-spot dry-fan station, post-event Insta-ready reel of activation), team size (4 staff + 1 coordinator), timing (lunch hour 12–4 pm), turnaround per employee (avg 6 min mehndi simple finger-trail to allow 60 in 4 hours with 2 artists). Pricing ₹62,000 + GST inclusive; add-ons (extra 30 employees ₹16,000, full-hand upgrade ₹350/head, glitter ₹150/head). Mention setup 60-min buffer, dress-code polo + apron, all-female team. End with 3 client-logo names previously served and a calendar block link for HR. Tone — professional, festive, brand-safe.

prompts.title: Men's Mehndi & Sufi Cuff Pricing
prompts.prompt: Act as a mehndi artist building India's most-Googled service page for men's mehndi (grooms, brothers, friends, festival). Output a 600-word web copy + WhatsApp pitch. Cover styles — (1) Sufi cuff wrist band ₹400 (10 min), (2) bracelet style with bride's initial ₹600, (3) full back-of-hand single-line geometric ₹800, (4) groom-special palm pattern with name + wedding date hidden ₹1,200, (5) full forearm mandala (Karva-style for husbands) ₹1,800, (6) bridegroom heavy palm-and-back-hand Mughal motif ₹3,500. Address male objections — 'will it look feminine?' (geometric, tribal, calligraphic styles offered), 'how long will it stain?' (10–14 days, palm darker than back), 'will it stick to suit/sherwani?' (dry under fan 30 min, avoid touching cloth 90 min), 'safe for sensitive skin?' (organic, patch-test, no PPD). Add a couple-package upsell (groom + bride combo ₹4,000 saving), corporate Karwa-Chauth-week 'husbands only' booking slot ₹5,000 for 8 men. Include 5 SEO-friendly subheadings, 3 FAQs, and a strong WhatsApp CTA.

prompts.title: Instagram Reel Script — Design Close-Up
prompts.prompt: Act as an Insta growth strategist for a bridal mehndi artist with 18k followers, target 50k by next wedding season. Write a 30-second reel script for a slow-motion close-up of a Rajasthani full-hand bridal mehndi being applied. Output — (a) 5-second hook line on screen ('Rajasthani brides, this one's for you'), (b) shot list with 8 cuts — overhead cone-tip, bride's eye glance to camera, peacock motif close-up, groom-initial reveal, glitter dust slo-mo, hand-flip palm reveal, kalira-jingle B-roll, final wide of completed hand on red dupatta, (c) trending audio recommendation (mention 3 current trending audios — one wedding instrumental, one Bollywood Pasoori-style remix, one ASMR cone-squeeze sound), (d) on-screen captions in Devanagari + English bilingual, (e) 30 hashtags split into 10 city-tags (Jaipur, Udaipur, Jodhpur, Ajmer, Bikaner, etc.), 10 niche-tags (#rajasthanibridalmehndi #marwaribridemehndi #peacockmehndi), 10 broad-tags (#indianbride #wedmegood #shaadisaga), (f) caption copy 80 words with CTA + booking-link in bio + festive-week-slots-filling-fast urgency, (g) best post time 8:45 pm IST Thursday.

prompts.title: Carousel — Bride Of The Week Showcase
prompts.prompt: You are a bridal makeup + mehndi artist planning a 10-slide Instagram carousel titled 'Bride of the Week — Aishwarya, a Gujarati bride from Surat'. Write the full carousel content. Slide 1 — cover, glamorous portrait, bold serif title 'Aishwarya', wedding date, 2 emoji florals. Slide 2 — bride's brief story 60 words (love-marriage, 5-day celebration, panetar saree). Slide 3 — mehndi night photo with Indo-Gujarati full-hand-to-elbow design close-up, caption 'Floral motifs with hidden K for Karan'. Slide 4 — haldi morning dewy minimal makeup + braided gajra. Slide 5 — sangeet bold smokey + retro-waves + jewelled hair-piece. Slide 6 — wedding-day airbrush look + heavy bun + kalira detailing. Slide 7 — reception — modern monochrome berry lip + sleek low pony. Slide 8 — products used (MAC Studio Fix, Huda Beauty palette, Anastasia brow, Lakmé Absolute) — 8 product tags. Slide 9 — testimonial pull-quote from Aishwarya in italics. Slide 10 — 'Book your bridal trial' CTA + WhatsApp number + studio handle. Caption 220 words, 30 hashtags, partner credits (photographer, decor, lehenga). Tone — celebratory, vendor-collab-friendly.

prompts.title: Pre-Festival Posting Calendar (Sept-Nov)
prompts.prompt: Act as a content strategist planning a 75-day Instagram + WhatsApp Status posting calendar for a mehndi & makeup studio from 1 Sept to 15 Nov, covering Ganesh Chaturthi → Navratri → Karwa Chauth → Dhanteras → Diwali → Bhai Dooj. Output a week-by-week table (11 weeks). Each week column — theme (e.g. Week 3: 'Navratri Garba glow makeup'), 4 post formats (1 reel, 1 carousel, 1 single image, 1 story poll), pillar mix (40% educational, 30% promo, 20% behind-the-scenes, 10% client UGC), CTA per week (early-bird, slot-filling, last-3-slots, fully-booked-waitlist), hashtag-set rotation, festive-rate-card drop date, WhatsApp broadcast topic of the week, expected engagement KPI (saves > 200, shares > 50, DM enquiries > 25). Build in 3 paid-promotion ad slots (boost top-performing reel ₹500 budget), 2 collab-with-photographer reels, 1 giveaway (free Karwa Chauth mehndi for 5 winners). End with content-batching tip — shoot 10 reels in 1 studio day on 25 Aug. Layout suitable for a Notion table.

prompts.title: City-Specific Hashtag Bank
prompts.prompt: Act as a hashtag researcher for an Indian bridal mehndi artist targeting 8 cities — Mumbai, Delhi-NCR, Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Kolkata, Pune, Ahmedabad. For each city, output a hashtag bank of 30 tags split into — 10 hyperlocal area tags (#bandrabridalmakeup, #kotigerebride, #jubileehillsbride, #adyaarbride, #parkstreetbride, #koregaonparkbride, #satellitebride, etc.), 10 city-style tags (#mumbaibride, #delhibride, #bangalorebride, #hyderabadibride, #chennaibride, #bengalibride, #punebride, #amdavadibride), 10 service-style tags (#mumbaibridalmehndi, #delhibridalmakeup, #bangalorehairstylist, #hyderabadibridalartist). Include 5 do-not-use hashtags per city (banned, shadow-banned, irrelevant). Add a posting-time recommendation per city based on local engagement peaks (e.g. Mumbai 9:15 pm, Delhi 8:45 pm, Bengaluru 9 pm, Chennai 9:30 pm). Add 3 niche-creator collab handles to tag per city for cross-discovery. End with a monthly rotation rule — refresh top-30 every 30 days to avoid algorithmic fatigue.

prompts.title: Bride Trial Questionnaire (Pre-Trial 24h Form)
prompts.prompt: You are a bridal makeup artist about to conduct a 4-hour paid trial (₹6,500) for a 26-year-old bride 6 weeks before her Marwari wedding in Jaipur. Draft a 25-question pre-trial questionnaire to be sent on WhatsApp 24 hours before the trial. Cover — skin type (oily, dry, combination, sensitive), known allergies (latex, nuts, fragrance, lanolin, shellac), recent skincare actives (retinol, AHA, BHA, vitamin C — pause 7 days prior), recent facials / threading / waxing (last date), recent botox / filler / lasers (declare for liability), eye contacts vs lashes, eye-shape (almond, hooded, monolid, downturned), lip-shape, face-shape (round, oval, square, heart), preferred lip-finish (matte, satin, glossy), preferred coverage (medium HD, full HD, airbrush, MAC studio), wedding-day outfit colour (lehenga colour swatch please), jewellery photo (kundan / polki / temple / minimal), hair length & texture, hair extensions yes/no, preferred hairstyle (juda, half-up, braid, open curls), gajra / kalira / jewelled-pin choice, photographer's lighting style (flash-heavy / natural / mixed), iconic-bride references (3 Insta links), no-go list (anything she dislikes — heavy contour / glitter / fake lashes), comfort foods/drinks at trial, mother/sister joining, payment mode confirmation. End with logistics — address, reach-by time, what to bring.

prompts.title: Look-Board for Skin-Tone Matching
prompts.prompt: Act as a bridal makeup look-board curator. Build a look-board document for 4 Indian bridal skin tones — Fair (Fitzpatrick II, NC15-25), Wheatish (NC30-37), Dusky (NC40-45), Deep (NC45-50). For each skin tone, recommend — (1) 3 foundation shade options across MAC Studio Fix, Huda Beauty Faux Filter, Estee Lauder Double Wear, (2) 2 concealer shades, (3) blush palette (peach/rose/berry/brick), (4) eye palette direction (warm bronze, smokey kohl, jewel-tone emerald, copper-gold) with 2 trending Insta references each, (5) lip palette (3 shades safe for daylight + 3 for evening reception), (6) highlighter undertone (champagne / gold / rose-gold / bronze-pearl), (7) recommended bridal jewellery metal (rose-gold / gold / oxidised silver / kundan-meena) to flatter undertone, (8) best lehenga colour palette (3 colours that pop, 2 to avoid). Add 1-line photographer-flash advisory per tone (e.g. deep skin needs careful HMI lighting to avoid ashy). Output as 4 vertical look-board sections with image-direction notes a designer can use to lay out a Canva PDF.

prompts.title: Allergy & Patch-Test Protocol SOP
prompts.prompt: You are the safety lead at a bridal studio. Write a 2-page SOP titled 'Patch Test & Allergy Protocol for Mehndi & Makeup Clients'. Cover — (1) why we test (PPD / black-henna risk, foundation fragrance, latex glue in lashes, glitter, eucalyptus oil), (2) when to test (ideally 7 days before, minimum 48 hours before, never on the wedding day), (3) how to apply mehndi patch test (5mm dot of natural-henna paste behind ear AND inner forearm, observe 24h for itching, 48h for redness, 72h for blistering), (4) how to apply makeup patch test (foundation streak on jawline + concealer dot under eye + lipstick swatch on inner lip + lash glue dot on inner wrist), (5) red-flag reactions and immediate response (cold water rinse, stop application, calamine lotion, antihistamine OTC like Cetirizine 10mg, escalate to dermatologist if blister or breathing issue, document with photo + time-stamp), (6) high-risk client SOP (eczema, psoriasis, pregnancy, diabetes, thyroid, chemo recovery — request doctor's NOC), (7) record-keeping (signed consent form on file 3 years), (8) studio liability waiver wording. End with emergency-contact script and nearest-hospital list per studio location.

prompts.title: Photo-Readiness Pre-Wedding Checklist
prompts.prompt: Act as a bridal beauty consultant briefing a bride 48 hours before the wedding day so her face and skin photograph perfectly. Output a 'Photo-Readiness 48-hour Bridal Checklist' with timing-anchored tasks. T-48h — last facial/clean-up done (no later, swelling risk), threading + upper-lip + chin done, no new face-acid, hydrating sheet mask, 2.5 L water, no salty restaurant food, sleep 8 hours. T-36h — under-eye de-puff massage, lip scrub, gentle exfoliation feet/elbows, dry-brush body, manicure / pedicure with neutral colour (avoid red — mehndi clash), eyebrow-tint check. T-24h — light vegetarian dinner, no alcohol, no smoking (gum tone yellows), full-body moisturiser, hand mehndi peel-off carefully, no hot shower (over-dries skin), 8-hour sleep mandatory. T-12h — wake-up gentle yoga 15 min, lemon-honey water, dry-shampoo prep if hair will be styled fresh, Vaseline on lip + eyebrow + cuticle, eat protein breakfast, no garlic-heavy food. T-3h — arrive at venue 4 hours pre-baraat, no food on lap, take small sips of coconut water with straw. Add a 'do-not-do' list and a Mom's-checklist of items to bring (extra dupatta, blot papers, bobby pins, safety pins, tissue, bindi spare).

prompts.title: Wedding Day Kit Checklist (Lead Artist)
prompts.prompt: You are the lead bridal artist packing for a 14-hour wedding day. Build a master kit checklist organised in 8 zones for a single Pelican-style hard case + 2 trolleys. Zone 1 Skin Prep — primer, fixer, setting spray, makeup-melt balm, micellar, cotton, Q-tips, sheet masks. Zone 2 Foundation — MAC Studio Fix shade range NC15-50, Huda Faux Filter, Estee Double Wear, airbrush compressor + Temptu HD pods, sponges 6, brushes 24. Zone 3 Eyes — 6 palettes (warm/cool/neutral/jewel/glitter/bridal red-gold), 8 lash sets (wispy/dramatic/individual), 3 lash glues (latex + latex-free), kohl, gel liners 4 shades, mascara waterproof. Zone 4 Lips — 30 shades nude to red to berry, lip liners 12, gloss 6, matte 6, satin 6. Zone 5 Hair — straightener, curler 25mm, dryer, 3 brushes, 200 bobby pins, 50 U-pins, hair donut 3 sizes, hairspray strong, dry shampoo, 3 sets of clip-in extensions (jet black, brown-black, golden-brown), gajra fresh + reserve fake, hair pieces jewelled 4. Zone 6 Mehndi (if dual service) — 40 organic cones, 10 white henna, glitter 6 shades, swarovski sheets 4. Zone 7 Hygiene — sanitiser, gloves 50, masks 20, single-use disposables, bin liners 10. Zone 8 Personal — phone tripod, ring light, snacks, water, hand towel, change of clothes, emergency safety pins + bindi sticker pack.

prompts.title: Wedding Day Time-Block Per Ceremony
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior bridal artist building a minute-level time-block for a Punjabi wedding day with 3 looks — 6 am Haldi + 11 am Anand-Karaj + 7 pm Reception, all at the same farmhouse in Chandigarh. Bride needs hair + makeup for all 3, plus mother-of-bride and 2 sisters for the wedding ceremony. Output a runsheet with rows = time-blocks of 15 min from 4:30 am to 9 pm. Cover — 4:30 am artist arrival + setup, 4:45 bride wakes + skin prep, 5:00 makeup base, 5:25 light eye, 5:40 hair braid + gajra, 6:00 haldi look ready, 6:15 photo, 7:30 haldi-cleanup + bride shower, 8:30 makeup-restart base, 8:50 eye build-up Mughal-bride-look, 9:30 lip + lashes, 9:45 hair juda heavy + dupatta drape, 10:30 final touch + jewellery + portrait, 11:00 anand-karaj begins, 1:30 pm post-ceremony touch-up, 2:00 lunch break + bride rest, 4:30 reception look prep, 5:00 makeup-restart fresh, 6:00 hair restyle low pony + extension, 6:45 final, 7:00 reception entry. Parallel column for mom + sisters slot allocations 9:00–10:30. End with overtime-billing trigger after 9 pm + runner-helper task list.

prompts.title: 6 AM Haldi Look Step-By-Step
prompts.prompt: You are a celebrity bridal artist creating a step-by-step tutorial for the trending 'Dewy Sunrise Haldi' look, suitable for a 6 am haldi ceremony with bright outdoor turmeric. Output a 12-step routine with product names + technique notes + photo angles. Steps — (1) double cleanse with oil-balm + foaming gel, (2) ice-roll 2 min for de-puff, (3) hyaluronic serum + niacinamide, (4) SPF 50 lightweight (Re'equil / La Roche), (5) hydrating primer (Mac Strobe Cream), (6) sheer foundation 1 layer only (Charlotte Tilbury Hollywood Flawless Filter mixed 50/50 with Estee Double Wear), (7) cream blush peach (Milk Lip + Cheek), (8) cream highlight on high points (Rare Beauty Liquid Luminizer Enchant), (9) brushed-up brows (Anastasia Clear Brow Gel), (10) wash of warm-bronze eyeshadow + tightline kohl, no eyeliner, no lashes, (11) tinted lip balm soft pink (Burberry Kisses Sheer 213), (12) loose powder only at T-zone, mist with Skindinavia bridal spray. Hair — wet-look braid with marigold flowers + braided gajra at nape. Avoid heavy contour (will look muddy in yellow turmeric photos). Add stain-protection tip — barrier cream on neck + ears so haldi rinses off cleanly later.

prompts.title: Mughal-Bride Wedding Day Look Brief
prompts.prompt: Act as a luxury bridal artist designing a hero 'Mughal-Bride' wedding day look for a Hyderabadi bride wearing a maroon-gold farshi gharara. Output a complete look-brief covering — face (airbrush HD foundation Temptu shade #2, golden-bronze contour very subtle, 3D blush with cream + powder), eyes (red-gold cut-crease with kundan-stone outer corner, tightline kohl plus winged liner, 2 lash sets — natural + dramatic on top, brown softened lower lash), lips (deep rosewood matte stained lip with brown liner, blot for vintage stain), brows (filled but soft, no Insta-block), highlight (champagne-gold high points, no glitter overspray), hair (jet-black centre-part, voluminous low juda with 4 packets of fake hair, kundan maang-tikka + jhoomar, 2 jadau hair-pins on either side of the bun, white mogra-rose veni at the nape with 3 strands cascading), nath placement (left nostril, with chain to ear), dupatta drape (double-veil drape with kundan border on the head pinned with silver U-pins), portrait pose direction for the photographer. Add a sustaining-the-look plan for 6 hours of nikaah + dawat (touch-up kit, blot, lip refresh every 90 min). Mention budget tier ₹35k-₹55k.

prompts.title: South-Indian Bridal Look (Tamil + Telugu + Mallu)
prompts.prompt: You are a bridal artist creating a definitive south-Indian bridal look guide. Output 3 sub-looks — (A) Tamil Iyer/Iyengar bride in Kanjivaram red, (B) Telugu bride in Pochampally + traditional vaddanam, (C) Malayali Christian bride in white-gold kasavu saree. For each, specify — (1) skin prep + base appropriate for humid South Indian climate (sweat-resistant primer, oil-control airbrush), (2) eye look (Tamil — gold-coral with kohl 360 + thick winged liner; Telugu — emerald-green smokey + kundan corner; Malayali — soft bronze + dramatic lash for church photos), (3) lips (Tamil — red brick stain; Telugu — wine; Malayali — peachy-nude), (4) hair (Tamil — long oiled jadai with full mallipoo + jadanagam serpent ornament; Telugu — heavy bun with mango-leaf border + pearls + gajra; Malayali — half-up half-down with kasavu hair-piece + minimal flowers), (5) bindi style + maang-tikka choice + nose-ring style, (6) mehndi style (light Indo-Arabic only, palm-tip, never up to elbow as is North Indian), (7) photo direction (sun-temple golden hour for Tamil, indoor mantap warm-light for Telugu, garden-light for Malayali Christian), (8) budget bracket per look ₹22k-₹45k. End with one signature pose direction per look.

prompts.title: Juda Hair Style Engineering For Heavy Lehenga
prompts.prompt: Act as a bridal hair stylist breaking down the engineering of a heavy juda (low bun) that holds for 12 hours under a 9-kg lehenga + 3-kg dupatta + 2-kg jewellery. Output a 14-step technique guide. Steps — (1) wash hair night-before only, day-of dry-shampoo for grip, (2) tease crown using fine comb to lift root volume, (3) anchor base ponytail at nape with 2 elastics doubled, (4) attach 4 packets of donor hair (matched colour) using weft-clips + 8 bobby pins, (5) build a hair-donut foundation, (6) wrap natural + extension hair around donut clockwise, pin every 1.5 cm with criss-cross U-pins (count 60+), (7) lock with 200ml of strong-hold hairspray + heat-set with hairdryer warm-air, (8) 'invisible cage' technique — 4 hairnets stretched over bun and pinned beneath, (9) attach jadau hair-pins, kalanji, and clip-on side-veni, (10) drape pleated dupatta on head + pin to bun in 6 anchor points using strong U-pins (not bobby), (11) pressure-test with 3 head-side-to-side shakes, (12) load kalira + nath, (13) photograph 360 degrees for client approval, (14) leave 30 cm of pin-pack with mom for emergency. Add the touch-up rule — re-mist hairspray every 4 hours; never re-tie.

prompts.title: Half-Up Half-Down Sangeet Hair Tutorial
prompts.prompt: You are a bridal stylist preparing a tutorial for the trending 'half-up retro waves with jewelled clip' sangeet hairstyle. Output a 10-step tutorial + product list + photo-direction note. Steps — (1) section hair top-third, mid-third, bottom-third, (2) curl mid + bottom with 32mm wand horizontal direction for old-Hollywood waves, (3) cool-set 5 min with clips, (4) brush out gently with paddle for soft waves, (5) tease crown subtly, (6) pull top section back, secure at occipital bone with 2 elastics, (7) hide elastic with thin hair-strand wrap, (8) attach jewelled barrette / Maang-tikka clip / pearl comb at the join, (9) front-face-framing strands curled outward 'Bardot-style', (10) finish with light flexible hairspray + shine spray. Product list — Wella curling wand, Schwarzkopf Got2b spray, Moroccanoil shine spray, Goody bobby pins, Sephora jewelled clips. Suitable for which face shapes (oval, heart, long), avoid for very-round face. Suggest 3 lehenga colour pairings (mint-green, coral, midnight-blue). Add a 'sangeet-stage-ready' set-and-forget claim — 6 hours dance-proof + photo-proof. Closing note — pair with bold smokey eye + nude lip, never compete with statement neckpiece.

prompts.title: Gajra Placement Style Guide (Mogra + Rose)
prompts.prompt: Act as a bridal hairstylist building a gajra-placement style guide for 6 popular bridal hairstyles. For each style, give — flower choice (mogra / rose / orchid / marigold / jasmine + tuberose), gajra length (in inches), placement angle, pin-fixing technique, photo-effect, regional fit, freshness preservation tips. Styles — (1) heavy juda (12-inch mogra wrapped clockwise around bun, U-pin at 6 anchor points, fits Marwari + Punjabi), (2) South-Indian long jadai (40-inch malli string laid full length of braid, anchored every 4 inches with hidden bobby pin), (3) sangeet half-up (6-inch gajra at the join, like a hair-clip), (4) haldi braid (loose french braid with marigold + rose petals woven in at every 2 inches), (5) reception sleek-pony (wrap base of pony with 4-inch gajra ring), (6) Bengali bridal (white-rose veni at the side bun, lopa-mudra style). Freshness tips — order night-before from local mandir-flower vendor, store wrapped in damp newspaper inside fridge, mist with rose-water 30 min before pinning, never refrigerate marigold (browns fast). End with a vendor-sourcing note — Mumbai Dadar flower-market, Delhi Ghazipur, Bengaluru KR Market, Chennai Koyambedu.

prompts.title: Jewelled Hair-Piece Upsell Pitch
prompts.prompt: You are pitching brides a jewelled hair-piece add-on (kundan-pearl matha-patti / passa / jhoomar / hair-comb) as a ₹3,500–₹12,000 add-on to the bridal hair package. Write a 250-word WhatsApp pitch + 5 visual look-references. Cover — (1) trend pull ('Alia Bhatt's passa moment from her wedding sparked a 7x demand surge'), (2) why a jewelled piece transforms photos ('a single jhoomar reads even in wide-angle drone shots, your maang-tikka often disappears in side-profiles'), (3) options offered (rental ₹3,500 / week from in-house collection of 40 pieces vs purchase ₹6,500-₹35,000, both with insurance + sanitisation), (4) pairing rules (heavy mathapatti for centre-part juda only; passa for side-bun; jhoomar for front-bun; comb for half-up), (5) metal undertone + skin-tone matching, (6) timing logistics (need 3 days notice for rental, fitting at trial), (7) sangeet-vs-wedding-vs-reception choice, (8) social-media moment ('reel close-up of clip-fitting becomes top reel of 2024'). End with a soft urgency line — peak rentals book out 90 days before season + bonus offer of free hair-piece styling video for the bride's reel.

prompts.title: HD vs Airbrush vs MAC Kit Comparison Sheet
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior bridal artist writing a comparison sheet for brides confused between HD makeup, airbrush makeup, and traditional MAC studio-fix base. Output as a 3-column comparison table + a verdict per skin-type. Compare on 12 parameters — (1) finish (HD = natural-skin, Airbrush = soft-focus, MAC = matte-coverage), (2) coverage (medium / medium-buildable / full), (3) longevity (8h / 12h / 10h), (4) sweat-resistance, (5) photo-flash behaviour (HD natural in soft light, Airbrush flawless in flash, MAC may oxidise after 6h), (6) suitability for outdoor day-time vs indoor evening, (7) cost (HD ₹12k, Airbrush ₹18k, MAC ₹9k), (8) suitability for oily/dry/combo skin, (9) re-touchability mid-event, (10) cleansing-off effort (Airbrush hardest), (11) artist skill level required (Airbrush highest), (12) Insta-vs-real-eye difference. End with verdict — 'Haldi 6 am outdoors → HD; Wedding day mantap evening → Airbrush; Sangeet stage → MAC; Reception cocktail → Airbrush; Fair-fragile-skin bride → HD; Acne-prone full-coverage need → MAC; Sweat-prone Chennai/Goa wedding → Airbrush'. Add a budget upgrade ladder ₹9k → ₹12k → ₹18k.

prompts.title: Pre-Bridal Skin Routine 60 / 30 / 15 Day Plan
prompts.prompt: You are a bridal beauty consultant designing a 3-tier pre-bridal skin program — Gold (60 days, 8 sittings, ₹38,000), Silver (30 days, 5 sittings, ₹22,000), Bronze (15 days, 3 sittings, ₹12,000). For each tier, output the day-by-day plan with — facial type (Hydra-glow / Carbon-laser / Vampire-PRP / Diamond-microderm / O3 oxygen / Gold-leaf), home-skincare regimen (AM + PM with brand suggestions Re'equil, Minimalist, Foxtale, Plum, Cetaphil), diet & hydration (5 simple rules), supplement stack (biotin + vitamin C + collagen peptide + zinc — only with doctor nod), DIY night masks weekly, body-polish + tan-removal sittings, mani-pedi schedule, eyebrow-lash-tint timeline, hair-spa sittings (4 in Gold, 2 in Silver, 1 in Bronze), do-not-do list (no new acids 14 days prior, no waxing 48 hours prior, no facials 5 days prior, no chemical peels 21 days prior). For each tier add a 'do this if you have' protocol for acne-prone, melasma-prone, dry-eczema, dusky-uneven-tone. End with a side-by-side comparison block + ROI message for the bride 'photos last forever'.

prompts.title: Contour Map For Round vs Oval vs Heart Face
prompts.prompt: Act as a makeup educator publishing a definitive contour-map guide for Indian bridal faces. Output 4 face-shape sections — Round, Oval, Heart, Square. For each give — (1) face-shape diagnostic (jawline-cheekbone-forehead width ratios, hairline test), (2) primary contour goal (slim jaw / lift cheekbones / soften forehead), (3) contour placement map (5 strokes — temple, hollow-of-cheek, jaw-line, sides-of-nose, under-chin) with stroke direction and intensity, (4) highlight placement (forehead T, brow-bone, cupid's bow, chin centre, nose bridge top-half only), (5) blush placement (round = upward diagonal towards temple to lengthen; oval = apple-of-cheek; heart = below cheekbone outward; square = round-circular on apple to soften), (6) bronzer overlay direction, (7) recommended product textures (cream first, powder set, never powder-only on dry skin), (8) one bridal-photo-tested look reference per face shape with photographer-flash recommendation. Add a 'too-much-contour rescue' SOS — buff with a clean kabuki + dewy mist. Mention 3 product favourites — Charlotte Tilbury Filmstar, MAC Sculpting Powder Sculpt, Anastasia Cream Contour. Avoid 'Insta-meme' over-contoured looks for Indian skin tones.

prompts.title: Cone Stock Management Spreadsheet Logic
prompts.prompt: You are running a 6-artist mehndi studio that goes through 4,000 cones in peak season (Sep–Feb). Build the inventory-management logic for a Google Sheets system. Output the column structure + auto-formulas + reorder triggers. Columns — Date, Cone-batch ID, Henna source (Sojat-Rajasthan / Pakistani / Yemeni), Paste-prepared-by (artist name), Cones-made, Refrigerated-batches, Field-released-batches, Per-cone cost (₹14 raw + ₹4 labour + ₹2 packaging = ₹20), Sale-price-equiv (₹35 internal cost-out), Shelf-life days (10 days raw + 30 days frozen), Use-by date, Disposal date, Reason-for-disposal. Build formulas — auto-calc days-to-expiry, conditional-format red <2 days, weekly burn-rate average, festive-week 3x multiplier auto-flag, reorder trigger when 'available cones' < (next-7-day-bookings × 1.4 buffer). Build a 'paste-recipe-batch' tab — water-volume, lemon-juice ml, sugar tsp, eucalyptus-oil ml, sieve-mesh-microns, rest-time hours, sift-twice-flag, tested-on-back-of-hand by senior artist, stain-darkness-grade A/B/C. Add a weekly Monday-morning Slack alert script. End with a 6-month seasonality forecast curve template.

prompts.title: Freelance Assistant Pay Sheet & SOP
prompts.prompt: Act as a bridal studio operations head hiring 12 freelance assistant mehndi/makeup artists for the wedding season Oct–Feb. Draft (a) a pay-sheet structure, (b) an onboarding SOP, (c) a standard freelancer agreement. Pay-sheet — Trainee tier ₹800/4-hour shift, Junior ₹1,500/4h + ₹250 per additional hour, Senior ₹3,500/8h + 5% of bill if upsell achieved, Lead ₹7,500/event-day flat. Add allowances (cab ₹300 within city, lunch ₹250, late-night >11pm extra ₹500, outstation per-diem ₹2,500), bonuses (5-star Google review with name-mention ₹250, repeat-bookings-from-referral 8% commission for 12 months). SOP — uniform (black kurta + white apron), grooming (neat hair, no strong perfume — clashes with henna/products, neutral nail polish), arrival 60 min pre-event, kit-handling protocol, no-direct-client-contact-for-future-bookings clause, hygiene SOP, social-media-post embargo (no posting bride photos before studio). Agreement — 2-week notice, ₹10,000 penalty for no-show, IP rights of photos belong to studio, NDA for celebrity weddings, 18-month non-solicit. End with a freelancer-tier-promotion ladder.

prompts.title: Hair Extension Inventory Management
prompts.prompt: You are managing hair-extension inventory for a high-end bridal studio with 80+ brides per season. Build the inventory + sanitation system. List the 6 extension types you stock — clip-in straight, clip-in wavy, halo extension, hair donut foam, hair-bun ready-made, ponytail wrap (each in 4 shades — jet black, natural black, dark brown, golden-brown, and 3 lengths 16''/20''/24''). Build inventory tracking sheet columns — Item ID, Type, Shade, Length, Weight (gms), Purchase-date, Vendor, Cost (₹2,500-₹18,000 range), Sanitisation-cycle-count, Last-deep-clean-date, Currently-with (artist/bride/studio), Condition grade A/B/C, Retire-by-date. Sanitation SOP — after every bride: brush out, rinse with cold water + mild shampoo (no sulphates), conditioner soak 20 min, lay flat dry on towel (no hair-dryer), mist with isopropyl-alcohol-water mix 50:50 onto cap only, comb-detangle, store in muslin pouch with silica. Deep-clean every 5 uses. Retire after 25 uses or visible matting. Build a rental-vs-bride-purchase pitch — rental ₹2,000/event vs custom-fitted purchase ₹12,000 with 18-month free maintenance. End with a vendor sourcing list (Hyderabad temple-hair, Vietnamese imports, Indian-made Diva-Divine).

prompts.title: NRI Bride Remote Consult Workflow
prompts.prompt: Act as an Indian bridal artist increasingly booked by NRI brides flying in from US, UK, Canada, Singapore, Dubai for their India weddings. Build a 5-touchpoint remote-consult workflow. Touchpoint 1 (T-90 days, 45-min Zoom) — intro, wedding overview, ceremony list, lehenga images, jewellery photos, cultural style preferences, allergy history, current skincare regime in destination country, climate-acclimatisation note (skin behaves differently in India humidity), pre-bridal home-care kit ship via DHL ₹14,000 (3 serums + 2 masks + cleansing balm). Touchpoint 2 (T-60, WhatsApp) — share trial-look mood-board PDF, lock 2 looks. Touchpoint 3 (T-30, Zoom) — review skin progress photos, adjust products, schedule arrival-day touch-down facial. Touchpoint 4 (T-7, Zoom) — bride lands India, in-person trial booked T-5, hotel-room makeup-trial appointment confirmed, kit-list confirmed, walk-through of every ceremony's look in 10 minutes each, payment-mode (international wire vs UPI of relative). Touchpoint 5 (T-2 to wedding-day) — in-person trial, final tweaks, sign-off photo. Add a remote-consult fee structure ₹6,500 advance non-refundable adjusted into final package. End with a 'why remote consult is worth ₹6,500' justification.

prompts.title: Destination Wedding Travel Kit Pack-List
prompts.prompt: You are packing for a 5-day destination wedding in Udaipur for a 2-artist team flying from Mumbai. Build a hyper-detailed pack-list across — (1) Pelican hard-case 1 (foundations + airbrush compressor + brushes), (2) Pelican hard-case 2 (eyes + lips + lashes), (3) Trolley A (hair tools + extensions + bun pieces + 200 pins), (4) Trolley B (mehndi cones in cooler-box with ice-pack, 60 organic + 20 white + 8 glitter tubes), (5) Carry-on backpack (laptop, payment device, contracts, schedule printouts, phone tripod, ring light, snack bars, change of clothes), (6) Personal duffle (uniform x5 days, comfortable-shoes-2-pairs, personal toiletries, prescription medicine, sanitary supplies). Airline rules note (airbrush compressor — battery removed, gel cone packs <100ml carry-on safe, henna paste declared as 'herbal cosmetic', hair-spray <100ml per can, max 4 cans per artist, lithium-ion ringlight battery in carry-on only). Add a 'forgotten-something' rescue plan — list of nearest pharmacy/vendor/courier in Udaipur (Sahelion-ki-Bari market, Hathi-Pol store, Delhivery same-day from Mumbai). End with a packing-time estimate 6 hours + a check-in-airport buffer 3.5 hours.

prompts.title: Karwa Chauth Assembly Line Workflow
prompts.prompt: Act as a Karwa Chauth assembly-line operator running a 9-hour back-to-back booking day on 20 Oct, target — 45 women in 9 hours across 2 home-visit gigs + 1 RWA society lounge. Build the operations plan. Hour-by-hour schedule — 8 am artist team of 4 arrive at first home-gig (15 ladies, host pays ₹18,000 inclusive), set up 4 stations facing the same wall for parallel work, 8:15 am start, 8 min per simple finger-trail / 18 min per medium / 35 min per heavy-bridal-style, station rotation every 90 min for ergonomic break, 1 pm wrap + clean-up + UPI-payment + 4 selfies for client testimonial. 1:30 pm transit (cab pre-booked), 2 pm RWA society lounge in Greater Kailash, 20 ladies booked via society WhatsApp group (₹1,200 per head, host society blocks the lounge), photo-corner setup with husband-name-reveal moment, 5 pm wrap. 5:30 pm transit, 6 pm third home-gig of 10 ladies in Vasant Vihar (₹1,500 per head premium), finish by 8:30 pm. Per-artist day-rate ₹4,500 + ₹500 travel allowance + ₹250 dinner. Cone burn ~120 cones. Add a contingency — if 1 artist falls sick, swap-in protocol from standby pool. End with a daily revenue target ₹62,000 net of artist payout.

prompts.title: 7-Day Bridal Beauty Countdown
prompts.prompt: You are giving a bride a 7-day countdown plan to wake up wedding-day glowing, calm, and photo-ready. Output a day-wise checklist with timing-anchored actions across skin, hair, body, sleep, food, mind. Day 7 — last facial / clean-up / glow-peel (no later), threading + brow-shape, deep-condition hair-spa, dry-brush body, 3L water, 10k steps walking outdoor for natural glow, light yoga 30 min, journaling 'wedding-week intentions'. Day 6 — gentle hydrating sheet mask, full-body waxing with cold wax (no hot wax — bumps), pedicure + manicure with neutral / mehndi-friendly nude polish, gentle dinner home-cooked, no restaurant, no AC sleep-on-skin direct. Day 5 — bridal trial with artist 4 hours, return home + double-cleanse, hyaluronic mask, sleep 8 hours strict. Day 4 — mehndi night prep, light dinner, mild walk. Day 3 — mehndi application start 4 pm, family + friends ceremony, peel-off 6 hours later, balm hands. Day 2 — sangeet, eat-light, hydrate-heavy, no alcohol if possible. Day 1 (mehndi/haldi day) — early sleep 10 pm. Day 0 wedding day — wake 5:30 am, lemon-honey water, 15 min meditation, breakfast oats + banana, arrive at vanity. Add a 'mom's checklist' parallel column.

prompts.title: Diabetes & Sensitive Skin Client SOP
prompts.prompt: Act as the safety lead at a bridal studio writing a SOP for handling brides + clients with diabetes, hypothyroidism, eczema, psoriasis, sensitive-skin, or under chemo recovery. Cover — (1) intake form question additions (medical history, current meds, last hospital visit, doctor's name + clearance NOC), (2) insulin-dependent diabetic special handling (don't apply mehndi or makeup if blood sugar very high — risk of slow healing if accidental scratch, schedule mid-morning post-meal slot, avoid foot-mehndi if neuropathy is present — risk of unnoticed injury, no glitter pigments — known sensitiser), (3) eczema/psoriasis (patch-test 7 days prior on a calm patch, avoid eucalyptus oil + clove oil + lemon-juice in henna paste, opt for water-based gentle organic henna, recommend petroleum-jelly barrier on adjacent skin, no heavy contour around flare-up zones, recommend mineral foundation), (4) chemo-recovery (no PPD ever, no harsh adhesives — use latex-free lash glue, request oncologist NOC, avoid scalp pressure if recent radiation), (5) thyroid (puffy eyes — pre-cool with ice-roll, use brightening concealer, avoid heavy lash-band weight). End with a documented-consent-form template + emergency-protocol + nearest-hospital list.

prompts.title: JustDial & UrbanCompany Listing Optimisation
prompts.prompt: You are optimising your bridal-mehndi-and-makeup studio listings on JustDial, UrbanCompany, and BookEventz to triple inbound leads. Output a platform-by-platform optimisation playbook. JustDial — title (60 chars, include city + service + USP), keyword density (12 high-intent phrases — 'bridal mehndi artist Bandra', 'organic henna Mumbai', 'destination wedding makeup'), photo-set (40 photos, 70% client portfolio + 20% process + 10% team), price range (₹2,000-₹50,000 displayed for trust), reviews target (4.7+ with 80+ count, request reviews via WhatsApp post-event with direct review link), business-hours (10am-9pm, Sundays open during wedding season), respond-to-enquiry under 5 min for ranking boost. UrbanCompany — service categorisation (Bridal Makeup Premium / Party Makeup / Engagement Makeup / Pre-bridal), pricing as per UC ladder, mandatory training certification upload, artist photo + bio, after-service rating focus 4.85+, turn-around-time, package upsells, rebook-rate. BookEventz — wedding-vendor profile, video tour, signature looks gallery, package tiers PDF, real-wedding case studies 4. End with cross-platform pricing-consistency rule (don't undercut UC pricing on JustDial — same client may compare).

prompts.title: Bridal Trial Invoice + Adjust-Into-Booking Logic
prompts.prompt: Act as a studio finance manager designing a bridal trial pricing structure that works as a soft-conversion lever. Output the policy — Trial fee ₹6,500 paid in advance, includes 4 hours of artist time + 2 looks + 30-min hair styling + photographer-grade portrait shot of trial result. Conversion logic — if bride books any wedding-day package within 21 days of trial, ₹4,000 of trial fee is adjusted into the bridal package balance. If she doesn't book, trial fee retained as standalone service revenue (no refund). Exception — corporate / shoot-trial standalone is ₹4,500 flat. Tier discounting if package ≥ ₹40,000 entire trial fee adjusted. Build the WhatsApp script that the studio sends post-trial within 24 hours — 'Hope you loved your trial, Aishwarya. Sharing your portrait + product list. Booking your wedding-day with us in next 21 days unlocks ₹4,000 trial-fee adjustment. Limited Nov–Feb dates left. Want me to hold 14 Feb provisional?' Add the logic for the GST-compliant invoice format, advance-receipt format, post-event final-invoice with itemised breakdown. End with a 30-day reminder cadence (Day 3, Day 7, Day 14, Day 20).

prompts.title: Studio Hygiene Promise Page Copy
prompts.prompt: You are writing the hygiene-promise page on the studio website to win bride trust in a post-COVID world. Output 600 words of copy + 8 sub-headings + 6 photo-direction notes. Cover — (1) 'Why hygiene is non-negotiable for bridal beauty' — health, allergic reaction prevention, photo-perfect skin, (2) Single-use disposables policy (every brush sanitised in barbicide post-use, sponges single-use only, mascara wands disposable, lip-applicators single-use, foundation decanted into separate palette per client), (3) Brush sanitation SOP (cleanse-after-each-client with brush-cleanser, deep-wash weekly with baby shampoo, UV-cabinet 4 hours daily), (4) Mehndi hygiene (single-use cones, fresh batches every 5 days, no double-dipping, sanitise hands of artist between every guest, separate cone per client even within same family), (5) Tools (electrolysed-water spray, alcohol wipes, UV sterilisation cabinet for tweezers + scissors), (6) Studio environment (HEPA filter, daily fumigation, separate sanitised zone for bridal trial, AC service quarterly), (7) Artist personal hygiene (uniform daily change, nails trimmed, no perfume, no jewellery on hands, masks during makeup), (8) Client-side request — please come freshly washed, no oily skincare. End with a guarantee — 'See us sanitise in front of you, every time'.

prompts.title: Bridal Photoshoot Concept Brief — Studio Portfolio
prompts.prompt: Act as a bridal makeup + mehndi studio creative director planning an 8-look in-house portfolio shoot to refresh website + Insta + JustDial photos. Output the shoot plan. Shoot day — 1 day, 8 looks, 1 model rotation x4 + 4 real brides, ₹85,000 budget. 8 looks — (1) Marwari heavy bride red lehenga maathapatti haveli setup, (2) Bengali alta bride white-red saree shaadi-pandal setup, (3) Punjabi anand-karaj bride with kalira gurudwara-inspired backdrop, (4) South-Indian Tamil bride red Kanjivaram temple-courtyard, (5) Modern minimalist court-marriage ivory ensemble, (6) Mehndi night theme heavy henna both hands close-up, (7) Engagement modern smokey + pastel lehenga, (8) Reception sleek-pony berry-lip cocktail. Crew — photographer ₹25k, decor + props ₹15k, model fees ₹16k for 4 (₹4k each), wardrobe rental ₹8k, flowers + jewellery rental ₹12k, makeup-products replenish ₹6k, lunch + assistance ₹3k. Output deliverables — 200 edited photos, 8 reels, 4 carousel posts, 1 YouTube BTS, 1 website hero video. Posting calendar across 60 days. ROI target — 25 bridal enquiries within 90 days, 8 conversions, ₹4 lakh revenue back. Mention vendor-collab credit-tagging.

prompts.title: Henna Paste Recipe Doc (Studio Standard)
prompts.prompt: You are the senior mehndi artist documenting the studio's signature organic henna paste recipe so all assistants can replicate identical stain quality. Output a step-by-step recipe + science notes + storage SOP. Ingredients (for 100-cone batch) — 500g triple-sifted Sojat-Rajasthan henna powder (mesh 200), 350ml filtered water, 80ml fresh lemon juice (strained), 50g caster sugar, 15ml pure eucalyptus essential oil (Doterra), 5ml clove essential oil (do skip for sensitive-skin client batch), 2 tsp instant black tea brewed strong. Method — (1) sift henna powder 3x to remove any grit, (2) brew tea + cool, (3) mix tea + lemon + water in glass bowl, never metal, (4) gradually add liquid into powder, whisk to thick-pancake-batter consistency, (5) cover with cling film, rest 8 hours at 25°C for dye-release, (6) check for terps — when colour rises to surface (slight orange film), it's ready, (7) add sugar + essential oils, mix gently, (8) pipe into cones using cone-filling-funnel, seal tip with cellophane tape. Storage — refrigerate at 4°C up to 10 days, freeze up to 30 days, never re-freeze. Avoid synthetic dye, never PPD, never kerosene. Test on back-of-hand before client release. End with a stain-quality grading rubric (A = burgundy 21+ days, B = brick-red 14 days, C = orange 7 days).

prompts.title: Insta DM Lead-Qualification Bot Script
prompts.prompt: Act as a bridal studio digital manager writing a 5-step ManyChat-style auto-DM bot script to qualify Instagram inbound leads. Trigger — bride DMs 'price?' or 'available 14 Feb?' Step 1 (auto-reply within 30 sec) — friendly greeting + thanks for DM + link to studio's pricing-and-style mood-board PDF + 'May I take 4 quick details to share an accurate quote?' Step 2 — quick-reply buttons — wedding date (calendar picker), city, ceremony list (multi-select chips), bride / family / group. Step 3 — based on input, branch logic — if bride + Mumbai + Feb → 'You are in our peak season, only 6 dates left', if family group + 8 ladies + Karwa Chauth → switch to Karwa rate-card flow. Step 4 — collect WhatsApp number + email + Insta-handle + 'best time to call you'. Step 5 — handover to human within 60 min during business hours, send GIF + intro of human team-member who'll WhatsApp her. Add fallback — if bride asks specific question outside flow, trigger 'a real human will reply in 2 hours, our office hours are 10–8 IST'. Add CTA opt-in — 'Subscribe to our weekly bride-of-the-week newsletter'. End with success-metric KPI (lead-to-booked-trial conversion 18%).

prompts.title: Reels Ideas Bank — 30 Concepts for Wedding Season
prompts.prompt: You are a content strategist building a 30-reel idea bank for a bridal mehndi + makeup artist for the Oct–Feb wedding season. Output 30 ideas, each with — title, hook line, format (transformation / tutorial / before-after / bride-of-the-week / process-asmr / stitched-trend / story-time / educational-myth-busting), trending audio direction, 5-shot list, ideal length (12-30 seconds), CTA, hashtag focus, posting day-time. Examples to seed — (1) 'Bride vs After 6 hours mehndi peel reveal', (2) 'Why your cousin's mehndi turned orange — 3 paste mistakes', (3) '6am haldi look in 6 minutes', (4) 'Marwari bride GRWM in 30 seconds', (5) 'Hidden groom name in mehndi — find it!', (6) 'Airbrush vs HD vs MAC photo battle', (7) 'How my Bengali bride's alta is hand-painted', (8) 'Heavy juda for 9-kg lehenga engineering', (9) 'NRI bride landing-day touchdown facial', (10) 'Karwa Chauth assembly line BTS'. Continue till 30 unique concepts, ensure mix of 10 educational + 10 portfolio + 10 entertainment-trend. Mention 'shoot-batch in 3 days' — 10 reels per shoot day. End with a tracking-template — track saves, shares, profile-visits, DMs as 4 KPIs per reel.

prompts.title: Annual Marketing Budget + Channel Mix
prompts.prompt: Act as the founder of a 6-artist bridal studio targeting ₹85 lakh annual revenue (next year +35%). Output an annual marketing budget plan ₹6.5 lakh across 11 channels with monthly cadence. Channel mix — (1) Instagram organic content production ₹1.2L (shoots, video editor freelance, props), (2) Insta paid boost ₹60k (₹5k/month avg, ₹15k peak season), (3) JustDial Premium listing ₹65k annual, (4) UrbanCompany lead-fee commissions estimated ₹85k, (5) BookEventz featured listing ₹35k, (6) Google My Business ads ₹40k, (7) WedMeGood featured-vendor listing ₹55k, (8) Influencer collab (5 micro-bridal influencers x ₹15k each = ₹75k), (9) 2 in-studio bridal-portfolio shoots ₹85k each totalling ₹1.7L (including model fees, decor, lehenga rentals, photographer), (10) Print + magazine PR ₹40k (1 Brides Today / Vogue Wedding feature), (11) Pop-up bridal-mela booth (Mumbai + Delhi) ₹50k. For each channel give expected leads / month, conversion rate, CAC, expected revenue contribution. Build the monthly P&L with month-on-month spend skew (60% in Sep–Feb peak, 40% in Mar–Aug). Add a quarterly review trigger — kill bottom-2 channels if CAC > ₹3,500 by Q2. End with a single-page CMO dashboard layout.

prompts.title: Crisis Playbook — When Things Go Wrong
prompts.prompt: You are the studio owner writing a crisis-response playbook for the 12 most likely wedding-day disasters. For each scenario — diagnosis, immediate fix (within 5 min), backup plan (within 30 min), client-communication-script (Hinglish), liability + refund logic, prevention SOP for next time. Scenarios — (1) Bride breaks out in red rash from foundation 90 min before mantap → cleanse + cool compress + hydrocortisone 1% + switch to mineral-only base + apologise + offer ₹5,000 goodwill credit, (2) Mehndi looks pale on hands of family on event day → re-apply with fresh batch + lemon-sugar mist seal + ₹500 per head adjustment, (3) Lead artist down with fever wedding morning → immediate substitution from senior pool + transparent client call + ₹3,000 goodwill, (4) Hair extension visible in client photo → on-site emergency tuck + hairspray + photographer-edit assistance, (5) Lehenga snags hairspray flake → pre-event coordination with stylist + Lakmé Quick Dry, (6) Lash falls mid-ceremony → portable lash-glue + tweezer in stations, (7) Client allergic to lipstick — switched to balm-tint, (8) Henna stain too dark groom-name unreadable → outline-touch-up with fineliner cone, (9) Power-cut at venue → ring-light + battery-pack + LED panels, (10) Late-night overtime past contract → polite invoice + transparent escalation, (11) Drunk-relative interrupts vanity → polite security-call protocol, (12) Negative Google review post-event → reply within 6 hours empathetic + offer call + recovery package. End with a crisis-tracking spreadsheet template + monthly review meeting.
